task: Keep the common-indicator semantic summary stable while the future `semantic/` slices are introduced.
verification: uv run pytest 'tests/test_semantic_form.py::test_build_semantic_model_reports_common_indicator_summary' -q
notes: Baseline semantic-model guard on the smallest verified fixture.

task: Keep the common-print-form semantic samples stable while the future `semantic/` slices are introduced.
verification: uv run pytest 'tests/test_semantic_form.py::test_build_semantic_model_reports_common_print_form_samples' -q
notes: Semantic-model guard on the larger mirror-policy fixture.

task: Keep the semantic-form CLI export healthy as the future `semantic/` workspace grows.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin semantic-form tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json" && python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding=\"utf-8\")); assert data[\"semantic_version\"] == 1; assert data[\"source\"][\"kind\"] == \"form_bin\"; assert data[\"container\"][\"form_record\"][\"split_form\"] is False; assert data[\"form_model\"][\"top_level_item_count\"] == 20; assert \"Печать\" in data[\"form_model\"][\"string_samples\"]" "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json"'
notes: End-to-end CLI guard for semantic-model export.

task: Keep AST build compatibility healthy while the semantic workspace layer exists.
verification: uv run pytest 'tests/test_form_ast.py::test_ast_json_roundtrip_and_build_form' -q
notes: Retains the adjacent AST workflow that the semantic model depends on.

task: Expose the inspect backbone inside the semantic summary on a normal fixture.
verification: uv run pytest 'tests/test_semantic_form.py::test_build_semantic_model_includes_inspect_backbone_for_cli_source' -q
notes: Bridges semantic-form to the richer inspect/container backbone without claiming full semantic slices yet.

task: Expose the first stable semantic slice for form meta on a normal fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin semantic-form tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json" && python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding=\"utf-8\")); meta=data[\"semantic\"][\"form.meta.json\"]; assert meta == {\"schema\": \"onec-formbin.form-meta.v1\", \"version\": 1, \"form_name\": \"common-print-form\", \"form_title\": \"Печать\", \"form_kind\": \"ordinary\", \"root_item_id\": \"form-root\", \"flags\": {\"has_explicit_title\": True, \"has_module_record\": True}}" "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json"'
notes: Introduces the first semantic slice as a bridge inside the semantic-form export.

task: Expose an AST-backed strings slice on a normal fixture with narrower ownership for current form-title, form-event handler, and matched command-title strings.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin semantic-form tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json" && python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding=\"utf-8\")); strings=data[\"semantic\"][\"strings.json\"]; title_items=[item for item in strings[\"items\"] if item[\"role\"] == \"form_title\"]; event_handler_items=[item for item in strings[\"items\"] if item[\"role\"] == \"event_handler\"]; command_title_items=[item for item in strings[\"items\"] if item[\"role\"] == \"command_title\"]; assert strings[\"schema\"] == \"onec-formbin.strings.v1\"; assert strings[\"version\"] == 1; assert len(strings[\"items\"]) == 151; assert title_items == [{\"id\": \"string-1-1-0-2-1\", \"value\": \"Печать\", \"owner_kind\": \"form\", \"owner_id\": \"form-root\", \"role\": \"form_title\"}]; assert event_handler_items == [{\"id\": \"string-4-1-2-1\", \"value\": \"ПередОткрытием\", \"owner_kind\": \"event\", \"owner_id\": \"event-4-1-2\", \"role\": \"event_handler\"}, {\"id\": \"string-4-2-2-1\", \"value\": \"ПередЗакрытием\", \"owner_kind\": \"event\", \"owner_id\": \"event-4-2-2\", \"role\": \"event_handler\"}]; assert command_title_items == [{\"id\": \"string-1-2-2-2-2-1-7-5-4-2-2-2-1\", \"value\": \"Печатать все\", \"owner_kind\": \"command\", \"owner_id\": \"command-1-2-2-2-2-1-7-5-4\", \"role\": \"command_title\"}, {\"id\": \"string-1-2-2-2-2-1-7-9-6-4-2-1\", \"value\": \"Печатать все\", \"owner_kind\": \"command\", \"owner_id\": \"command-1-2-2-2-2-1-7-5-4\", \"role\": \"command_title\"}]" "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json"'
notes: Keeps the strings bridge additive while tagging the current semantic-write-adjacent strings with narrower ownership.

task: Expose a conservative form-scope events slice on a normal fixture with stable bridge ids.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin semantic-form tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json" && python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding=\"utf-8\")); events=data[\"semantic\"][\"events.json\"]; assert events == {\"schema\": \"onec-formbin.events.v1\", \"version\": 1, \"items\": [{\"id\": \"event-4-1-2\", \"name\": \"Перед открытием\", \"handler\": \"ПередОткрытием\", \"scope\": \"form\", \"owner_id\": \"form-root\"}, {\"id\": \"event-4-2-2\", \"name\": \"Перед закрытием\", \"handler\": \"ПередЗакрытием\", \"scope\": \"form\", \"owner_id\": \"form-root\"}]}" "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json"'
notes: Introduces stable ids for the top-level form-events bridge without claiming control-event coverage yet.

task: Expose a conservative commands slice on a normal fixture from root command definitions with matching action titles.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin semantic-form tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json" && python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding=\"utf-8\")); commands=data[\"semantic\"][\"commands.json\"]; assert commands == {\"schema\": \"onec-formbin.commands.v1\", \"version\": 1, \"items\": [{\"id\": \"command-1-2-2-2-2-1-7-5-4\", \"name\": \"ПечататьВсе\", \"title\": \"Печатать все\", \"owner_id\": \"form-root\", \"source\": \"ast-root-title-match\"}]}" "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json"'
notes: Introduces `commands.json` as a bridge for AST root command definitions that have a matching action title in the same command section.

task: Materialize the current semantic slices into `semantic/*.json` during unpack on a normal fixture.
verification: uv run pytest 'tests/test_semantic_form.py::test_unpack_writes_semantic_slice_artifacts' -q
notes: Moves the current bridge slices from the monolithic semantic export into canonical workspace files under `semantic/`.

task: Materialize stable form-event ids and narrower string ownership tags into the unpacked semantic workspace on a normal fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin unpack tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/unpack" >/dev/null && python3 -c "import json,sys; from pathlib import Path; root=Path(sys.argv[1]); events=json.loads((root / \"semantic/events.json\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")); strings=json.loads((root / \"semantic/strings.json\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")); assert events == {\"schema\": \"onec-formbin.events.v1\", \"version\": 1, \"items\": [{\"id\": \"event-4-1-2\", \"name\": \"Перед открытием\", \"handler\": \"ПередОткрытием\", \"scope\": \"form\", \"owner_id\": \"form-root\"}, {\"id\": \"event-4-2-2\", \"name\": \"Перед закрытием\", \"handler\": \"ПередЗакрытием\", \"scope\": \"form\", \"owner_id\": \"form-root\"}]}; assert [item for item in strings[\"items\"] if item[\"role\"] == \"event_handler\"] == [{\"id\": \"string-4-1-2-1\", \"value\": \"ПередОткрытием\", \"owner_kind\": \"event\", \"owner_id\": \"event-4-1-2\", \"role\": \"event_handler\"}, {\"id\": \"string-4-2-2-1\", \"value\": \"ПередЗакрытием\", \"owner_kind\": \"event\", \"owner_id\": \"event-4-2-2\", \"role\": \"event_handler\"}]" "$tmpdir/unpack"'
notes: Adds explicit evidence that the richer bridge shape is materialized in canonical `semantic/*.json` workspace files, not only in the monolithic semantic-form export.

task: Materialize the first controls-tree bridge and control-name ownership tags into the unpacked semantic workspace on a normal fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin unpack tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/unpack" >/dev/null && python3 -c "import json,sys; from pathlib import Path; root=Path(sys.argv[1]); controls=json.loads((root / \"semantic/controls.tree.json\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")); strings=json.loads((root / \"semantic/strings.json\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")); assert controls[\"schema\"] == \"onec-formbin.controls-tree.v1\"; assert controls[\"version\"] == 1; assert controls[\"root_id\"] == \"form-root\"; items=controls[\"items\"]; root_item=items[0]; owner=next(item for item in items if item[\"id\"] == \"control-1-2-2-2\"); tree=next(item for item in items if item[\"id\"] == \"control-1-2-2-3-5-3\"); toggle=next(item for item in items if item[\"id\"] == \"control-1-2-2-3-5-6\"); assert root_item == {\"id\": \"form-root\", \"kind\": \"form\", \"name\": \"common-print-form\", \"title\": \"Печать\", \"parent_id\": None, \"child_ids\": [\"control-1-2-2-1\", \"control-1-2-2-2\", \"control-1-2-2-3\"], \"command_ids\": [], \"event_bindings\": []}; assert owner[\"command_ids\"] == [\"command-1-2-2-2-2-1-7-5-4\"]; assert owner[\"event_bindings\"] == []; assert tree[\"event_bindings\"] == [{\"id\": \"event-1-2-2-3-5-3-2-4-1-2\", \"name\": \"Дерево печати при активизации строки\", \"handler\": \"ДеревоПечатиПриАктивизацииСтроки\", \"scope\": \"control\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-3\"}]; assert toggle[\"event_bindings\"] == [{\"id\": \"event-1-2-2-3-5-6-2-2-1-2\", \"name\": \"Не использовать дерево печати при изменении\", \"handler\": \"НеИспользоватьДеревоПечатиПриИзменении\", \"scope\": \"control\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-6\"}]; assert [item for item in strings[\"items\"] if item[\"role\"] == \"control_name\"] == [{\"id\": \"string-1-2-2-1-4-1\", \"value\": \"КоманднаяПанель1\", \"owner_kind\": \"control\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-1\", \"role\": \"control_name\"}, {\"id\": \"string-1-2-2-2-4-1\", \"value\": \"ОсновныеДействияФормы\", \"owner_kind\": \"control\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-2\", \"role\": \"control_name\"}, {\"id\": \"string-1-2-2-3-4-1\", \"value\": \"Панель1\", \"owner_kind\": \"control\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3\", \"role\": \"control_name\"}, {\"id\": \"string-1-2-2-3-5-1-4-1\", \"value\": \"Разделитель1\", \"owner_kind\": \"control\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-1\", \"role\": \"control_name\"}, {\"id\": \"string-1-2-2-3-5-2-4-1\", \"value\": \"ТабДок\", \"owner_kind\": \"control\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-2\", \"role\": \"control_name\"}, {\"id\": \"string-1-2-2-3-5-3-4-1\", \"value\": \"ДеревоПечати\", \"owner_kind\": \"control\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-3\", \"role\": \"control_name\"}, {\"id\": \"string-1-2-2-3-5-4-4-1\", \"value\": \"КомандыДерева\", \"owner_kind\": \"control\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-4\", \"role\": \"control_name\"}, {\"id\": \"string-1-2-2-3-5-5-4-1\", \"value\": \"ПоОриентировать\", \"owner_kind\": \"control\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-5\", \"role\": \"control_name\"}, {\"id\": \"string-1-2-2-3-5-6-4-1\", \"value\": \"НеИспользоватьДеревоПечати\", \"owner_kind\": \"control\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-6\", \"role\": \"control_name\"}]" "$tmpdir/unpack"'
notes: Keeps the first controls-tree bridge evidence current while allowing additive command and control-local event linkage.

task: Materialize the first layout bridge from explicit control child lists into the unpacked semantic workspace on a normal fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin unpack tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/unpack" >/dev/null && python3 -c "import json,sys; from pathlib import Path; root=Path(sys.argv[1]); layout=json.loads((root / \"semantic/layout.json\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")); assert layout == {\"schema\": \"onec-formbin.layout.v1\", \"version\": 1, \"items\": [{\"control_id\": \"control-1-2-2-1\", \"container_id\": \"form-root\", \"order\": 0, \"group_kind\": \"form-root-child-list\", \"visibility\": \"unknown\"}, {\"control_id\": \"control-1-2-2-2\", \"container_id\": \"form-root\", \"order\": 1, \"group_kind\": \"form-root-child-list\", \"visibility\": \"unknown\"}, {\"control_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3\", \"container_id\": \"form-root\", \"order\": 2, \"group_kind\": \"form-root-child-list\", \"visibility\": \"unknown\"}, {\"control_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-1\", \"container_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3\", \"order\": 0, \"group_kind\": \"control-child-list\", \"visibility\": \"unknown\"}, {\"control_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-2\", \"container_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3\", \"order\": 1, \"group_kind\": \"control-child-list\", \"visibility\": \"unknown\"}, {\"control_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-3\", \"container_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3\", \"order\": 2, \"group_kind\": \"control-child-list\", \"visibility\": \"unknown\"}, {\"control_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-4\", \"container_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3\", \"order\": 3, \"group_kind\": \"control-child-list\", \"visibility\": \"unknown\"}, {\"control_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-5\", \"container_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3\", \"order\": 4, \"group_kind\": \"control-child-list\", \"visibility\": \"unknown\"}, {\"control_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-6\", \"container_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3\", \"order\": 5, \"group_kind\": \"control-child-list\", \"visibility\": \"unknown\"}]}" "$tmpdir/unpack"'
notes: Adds explicit evidence for the first layout bridge while keeping visibility and grouping semantics coarse and fixture-backed.

task: Expose additive control-local command linkage inside the controls-tree bridge on normal fixtures without changing coarse commands ownership.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin semantic-form tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json" && python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding=\"utf-8\")); controls=data[\"semantic\"][\"controls.tree.json\"][\"items\"]; owner=next(item for item in controls if item[\"id\"] == \"control-1-2-2-2\"); assert owner[\"command_ids\"] == [\"command-1-2-2-2-2-1-7-5-4\"]; assert controls[0][\"command_ids\"] == []" "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json"'
notes: Keeps `commands.json.owner_id` coarse while making current control-to-command linkage explicit in `controls.tree.json`.

task: Expose additive non-command control-local event linkage inside the controls-tree bridge on normal fixtures without changing coarse form-scope events.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin semantic-form tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json" && python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding=\"utf-8\")); controls=data[\"semantic\"][\"controls.tree.json\"][\"items\"]; tree=next(item for item in controls if item[\"id\"] == \"control-1-2-2-3-5-3\"); toggle=next(item for item in controls if item[\"id\"] == \"control-1-2-2-3-5-6\"); assert tree[\"event_bindings\"] == [{\"id\": \"event-1-2-2-3-5-3-2-4-1-2\", \"name\": \"Дерево печати при активизации строки\", \"handler\": \"ДеревоПечатиПриАктивизацииСтроки\", \"scope\": \"control\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-3\"}]; assert toggle[\"event_bindings\"] == [{\"id\": \"event-1-2-2-3-5-6-2-2-1-2\", \"name\": \"Не использовать дерево печати при изменении\", \"handler\": \"НеИспользоватьДеревоПечатиПриИзменении\", \"scope\": \"control\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-6\"}]" "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json"'
notes: Keeps `events.json` coarse and form-scoped while surfacing the current control-local non-command event bindings additively in `controls.tree.json`.

task: Materialize the first attributes bridge from top-level control Pattern markers into the unpacked semantic workspace on a normal fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin unpack tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/unpack" >/dev/null && python3 -c "import json,sys; from pathlib import Path; root=Path(sys.argv[1]); attributes=json.loads((root / \"semantic/attributes.json\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")); assert attributes == {\"schema\": \"onec-formbin.attributes.v1\", \"version\": 1, \"items\": [{\"id\": \"attribute-1-2-2-3-5-3\", \"name\": \"ДеревоПечати\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-3\", \"data_path\": \"ДеревоПечати\", \"type_hint\": \"pattern:#\", \"role\": \"control_pattern_binding_candidate\"}]}" "$tmpdir/unpack"'
notes: Keeps the first attributes bridge conservative by only exporting controls whose wrapper metadata carries a top-level `Pattern` marker.

task: Materialize control-aligned owner ids inside the first attributes bridge on a normal fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin unpack tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/unpack" >/dev/null && python3 -c "import json,sys; from pathlib import Path; root=Path(sys.argv[1]); attributes=json.loads((root / \"semantic/attributes.json\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")); assert attributes == {\"schema\": \"onec-formbin.attributes.v1\", \"version\": 1, \"items\": [{\"id\": \"attribute-1-2-2-3-5-3\", \"name\": \"ДеревоПечати\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-3\", \"data_path\": \"ДеревоПечати\", \"type_hint\": \"pattern:#\", \"role\": \"control_pattern_binding_candidate\"}]}" "$tmpdir/unpack"'
notes: Makes the first attributes bridge less implicit by pointing each current attribute item at the control node that owns the same wrapper.

task: Expose explicit scope and owner metadata inside control-local event bindings on normal fixtures.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin semantic-form tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json" && python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding=\"utf-8\")); controls=data[\"semantic\"][\"controls.tree.json\"][\"items\"]; tree=next(item for item in controls if item[\"id\"] == \"control-1-2-2-3-5-3\"); binding=tree[\"event_bindings\"][0]; assert binding == {\"id\": \"event-1-2-2-3-5-3-2-4-1-2\", \"name\": \"Дерево печати при активизации строки\", \"handler\": \"ДеревоПечатиПриАктивизацииСтроки\", \"scope\": \"control\", \"owner_id\": \"control-1-2-2-3-5-3\"}" "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json"'
notes: Makes control-local event bindings less implicit by reusing the same scope/owner shape already used by event-like bridge items.

task: Materialize explicit scope and owner metadata for control-local event bindings into the unpacked semantic workspace on a normal fixture.
verification: uv run pytest 'tests/test_semantic_form.py::test_unpack_materializes_control_event_binding_metadata' -q
notes: Keeps the workspace `semantic/controls.tree.json` artifact aligned with the richer control-event binding shape already exported by `semantic-form`.

task: Materialize the current command bridge and control-link alignment into the unpacked semantic workspace on a normal fixture.
verification: uv run pytest 'tests/test_semantic_form.py::test_unpack_materializes_command_bridge_alignment' -q
notes: Keeps `semantic/commands.json` and `semantic/controls.tree.json` aligned in the canonical unpack workspace without broadening command ownership claims beyond the current fixtures.
